actionItems.title: 4 Permission Set(s) Grant ViewAllData
actionItems.action: Remove ViewAllData from permission sets. Grant targeted object- or record-level access instead.

actionItems.title: 5 Profiles Have Broad Data Permissions
actionItems.action: Restrict broad permissions to only system integration profiles. Use permission sets for exceptions.

actionItems.title: 2 Permission Set(s) Grant ModifyAllData
actionItems.action: Remove ModifyAllData from permission sets unless strictly required for integration users.

actionItems.title: 3 Permission Set(s) Grant ManageUsers
actionItems.action: Audit each permission set listed. Remove ManageUsers unless it is strictly required, and document the business justification.

actionItems.title: 2 Permission Set(s) Grant AuthorApex
actionItems.action: Audit each permission set listed. Remove AuthorApex unless it is strictly required, and document the business justification.

actionItems.title: 4 Permission Set(s) Grant ResetPasswords
actionItems.action: Audit each permission set listed. Remove ResetPasswords unless it is strictly required, and document the business justification.

actionItems.title: 6 Permission Set(s) Grant ModifyMetadata
actionItems.action: Audit each permission set listed. Remove ModifyMetadata unless it is strictly required, and document the business justification.

actionItems.title: 1 Permission Set(s) Grant InstallPackaging
actionItems.action: Audit each permission set listed. Remove InstallPackaging unless it is strictly required, and document the business justification.

actionItems.title: 69 Permission Set Pair(s) Have >60% Permission Overlap
actionItems.action: Consolidate overlapping permission sets into a single canonical set, or extract shared permissions into a base set and reference it from a Permission Set Group.

actionItems.title: 110 Permission Set(s) Are Members of 3+ Permission Set Groups
actionItems.action: Refactor so that widely-shared permissions live in a dedicated base permission set with a clear owner, and limit its membership to groups where it is truly required.

actionItems.title: 11 Active Flows Lack Fault Handling
actionItems.action: Add Fault connector paths to all Screen and Autolaunched Flows. Log errors to a custom object for visibility.

actionItems.title: Automation Conflicts on 2 Object(s)
actionItems.action: Consolidate automation into a single Record-Triggered Flow per object. Retire redundant flows.

actionItems.title: 37 Apex Triggers — High Volume
actionItems.action: Consider a Trigger Framework (one trigger per object, handler pattern) to centralise trigger logic.
